description: Sector overlay for sports organizations, clubs, federations, academies, events, athlete welfare, insurance, safeguarding, and sports-governance documentation in Ghana.

metadata.scope: Ghana-only sector overlay controls for Sports. Intended to be used with ghana_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Ghana legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: National Sports Authority objectives and functions
Cybersecurity Act, 2020 (Act 1038)
used_for: digital sports platforms and cybersecurity controls

primary_sources.name: Companies Act, 2019 (Act 992)
primary_sources.issuer: Republic of Ghana / Registrar of Companies

rules.title: Sports organization, event, federation, or academy governance evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for National Sports Authority, federation, registered club, academy, event approval, governance, or sports development evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: National Sports Authority objectives and functions

rules.title: Athlete welfare, insurance, safeguarding, or medical controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for athlete welfare, insurance, medical clearance, safeguarding, minors, concussion, injury, or risk controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Ghana legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, source currency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: National Sports Authority objectives and functions

rules.title: Athlete, minor, medical, or fan data-protection controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for data protection, privacy notice, consent, minors, medical records, athlete data, retention, or confidentiality evidence.

rules.title: Digital platform or cybersecurity controls are documented where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for cybersecurity, access control, incident response, online registration, payment security, or system monitoring evidence.
